gap_statement: Increase robustness to floor-plan quality: handle noisy/low-quality plans without extensive preprocessing.
evidence_text: A key challenge in this domain is the Seating Allocation (SA) problem, which involves assigning teams to office space on a floor plan.

gap_statement: Improve alignment with human preferences: incorporate preference-aware objectives or constraints.
evidence_text: The usefulness between HSA and SA is significant to large organizations as the humanevaluated solution quality to SA would be low due to failure to accommodate linked departments.

gap_statement: Improve scalability: reduce computational complexity / variables so the approach works for large instances.
evidence_text: A direct optimization approach could be employed to minimize the total seat distance between each seat, but this results in a mixed-integer quadratic problem (MIQP), which is not scalable for large instances due to the number of decision variables in the objective.

gap_statement: Improve alignment with human preferences: incorporate preference-aware objectives or constraints.
evidence_text: Conversely, if the allocation framework in step 2 does not adequately model human preferences, the solution quality, as reviewed by a human, would similarly be poor.

gap_statement: Reduce manual effort: automate tuning or reduce reliance on manual editing/parameter selection.
evidence_text: For high resolution floor plans when projected into x, y-plane, obtaining such efficient representations may require substantial manual editing.

gap_statement: Increase robustness to floor-plan quality: handle noisy/low-quality plans without extensive preprocessing.
evidence_text: Similarly, finding an adequate representation is also made difficult if the quality of the provided floor plans is low.

gap_statement: Reduce manual effort: automate tuning or reduce reliance on manual editing/parameter selection.
evidence_text: Moreover, for large organizations with extensive office footprints, manually adjusting each representation to compute optimal pairwise seat distances may be infeasible.

gap_statement: Improve robustness: identify failure modes and prevent repeated trial-and-error runs.
evidence_text: If the algorithm fails to connect all the seats, K can be increased, and the process repeated.

gap_statement: Improve scalability: reduce computational complexity / variables so the approach works for large instances.
evidence_text: The IPSA approach is computational expensive in practice due to the rapidly increasing number of variables in xik (|S|2), which makes large-scale problems intractable.

gap_statement: Reduce manual effort: automate tuning or reduce reliance on manual editing/parameter selection.
evidence_text: The hyper-parameters for δc and δs were manually tuned until the algorithm converged with a node limit of K = 2000.

gap_statement: Improve scalability: reduce computational complexity / variables so the approach works for large instances.
evidence_text: Solving the HSAP problem as a single monolithic instance is intractable for small, medium and large scale instances (i.e. over 50 seats).

gap_statement: Refine and specify this gap into a testable research question.
evidence_text: Empirically, varying |S| or |T| across different instances is insufficient to gauge the time-to-solution, as the difficulty and structure of the organizational hierarchy can vary unpredictably.

gap_statement: Improve alignment with human preferences: incorporate preference-aware objectives or constraints.
evidence_text: Although the optimization procedure was solved to optimality, a human decision-maker might choose to manually relocate the two teal seats in the top right quadrant to be adjacent, even if this adjustment slightly reduces the overall optimization objective.

gap_statement: Increase robustness to floor-plan quality: handle noisy/low-quality plans without extensive preprocessing.
evidence_text: The ball-shaped output from using PRM may not be ideal for open and densely packed office floor plans.

gap_statement: Improve alignment with human preferences: incorporate preference-aware objectives or constraints.
evidence_text: Future work should try to improve the disconnect between the constrained programming and human-evaluated solution quality by studying in which scenarios different solution methods and distance estimation techniques performs best.

gap_statement: Investigate recommended future direction described by the authors and propose a concrete experiment to test it.
evidence_text: Future work could focus on developing a dynamic pipeline to determine the most suitable algorithm(s) based on the size and complexity of each subproblem could be beneficial.
